zh.Sutton Coldfield, Birmingham district, W: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Harmon於1430年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塞頓 可爾德費爾德時，他的父親Sir Walter Harman50歲，母親Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire26歲。他去世於1462年11月12日在英國英格蘭肯特可雷福德享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦可雷福德聖 包林努也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Harmon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Herman, adopted from ancient Germanic Hariman, Her(e)man, composed of elements meaning ‘army’ + ‘man’.
Americanized form of German   Harmann   or   Hermann  . Compare   Harman  .

variants.name: Harmond
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Harmon  .

variants.name: Hargadon
meanings: Irish (Sligo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArgadáin ‘descendant of Argadán’, a personal name from a diminutive of argad ‘silver’. In Galway the traditional form O'Hargadan has tended to be replaced by Hardeman, and elsewhere in Ireland by Harman and Harmon .

variants.name: Harmony
meanings: Variant of   Harmon  , a surname of German origin.
English: unexplained. This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Harmon was born in 1430, in Sutton Coldfield, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter Harman, was 50 and his mother, Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire, was 26. He died on 12 November 1462, in Crayford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in St Paulinus' Church, Crayford, London, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Harmonが1430年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスットオン コルドフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Harmanは50歳，母Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshireは26歳であった。彼は1462年11月12日にイギリスイギリスケントクレイフォードで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンクレイフォードスト プアウリヌス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint Paulinus Church, Crayford, London: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크라이퍼드 스트 폴이누스' c후르치

ko.lifeSummary: John Harmon(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 수턴 콜드필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Harman(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1462년 11월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크라이퍼드에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크라이퍼드 스트 폴이누스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Harmon родился в 1430 г. в местности суттон колдфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Harman было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Sidney Lady Sutton Coldfield Warwickshire, 26.
